heading: Acceptance of funds for harbor dredging
label: 701h–4 Acceptance of funds for harbor dredging
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260section 2201 of this title

children.text: to dredge a non-Federal harbor or channel, or a marina or berthing area located adjacent to, or accessible by, such harbor or channel; or
to provide technical assistance related to the planning and design of dredging activities described in paragraph (1).
